tool_args.content:
# Backup current version
Copy-Item -Path 'C:\AI_VAULT\00_identity\brain_server.py' -Destination 'C:\AI_VAULT\00_identity\brain_server_backup.py'
# Apply proposed patch
patch -p1 < brain_episode_v1.diff
# Compile Python files
python -m py_compile brain_server.py
# Smoke test
Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8010/openapi/healthz'
